case_title: CHING LING TANG VS. SANDRA SHEUELAN MYINT

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, CHING LING AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY TANG, CHING LING AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TLEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF CHING LING TANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANDRA SHEUELAN MYINT, ASSISTED BY DAUGHTER (NO NAME PROVIDED) FOR BURMESE INTERPRETATION PRESENT BY COURTCALL. INTERPRETERS OATH IS PROVIDED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. COURT EXAMINES/QUESTIONS DEFENDANT ON COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS SUBMITTED TO COURT PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING ARE REVIEWED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, CHING LING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,440.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUN-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MYINT, SANDRA SHEUELAN
